failures.explanation: OsCKX9 OE paper reports increased tillers, but network cascade (CKX9→Cytokinin -1) gives decreased. Likely literature outcome reflects panicle/tiller-node developmental interaction not captured in the steady-state model.

[cascade_inversion] OsAHP KD cascades via CK → RR21 → IPA1 → TB1 with a net sign that predicts increased tillers; paper reports decreased. The CK→TF→IPA1 arm sign flow is inconsistent with the CK-tiller-promotion biology.
failures.fix_strategy: Consider adding OsAHP→IPA1 -1 OR flipping RR21→IPA1 sign; current RR21→IPA1 +1 gives AHP KD → RR21 KD → IPA1 KD → TB1 KD → tillers UP, opposite of literature

failures.explanation: [cascade_inversion] OsHK4 KO ratio 14.68: receptor loss should reduce CK signalling → reduce tiller outgrowth. Model predicts opposite because CK→HK4→AHP→RR21→IPA1 chain feeds into TB1 with signs that yield unintended IPA1 release on KO.
failures.fix_strategy: Review CK signalling cascade: HK4→AHP→RR21→IPA1 signs currently predict HK4 KO → TB1↓ → tillers↑; literature has tillers↓. AHP→IPA1 or RR21→IPA1 signs should be re-examined.

failures.explanation: IPI1 KO expected=increased conflicts with network biology (IPI1 degrades IPA1 → IPI1 KO stabilises IPA1 → TB1↑ → tillers↓). Raw literature encoding appears inverted vs. the Ub:IPI1 rescue evidence in T137.

IPI1 OE expected=decreased conflicts with network biology (IPI1 degrades IPA1 → IPI1 OE should reduce IPA1 → TB1↓ → tillers↑). Raw encoding likely reversed; consistent with T137 Ub:IPI1 partial rescue of ipa1-1D.

OsSHI1 OE expected=decreased but SHI1→IPA1 -1 gives SHI1 OE → IPA1↓ → TB1↓ → tillers↑. Raw encoding inconsistent with T060 (SHI1 KO → decreased also) — both directions reported as decreased suggests tissue-specific role not captured in steady-state model.

[cascade_amplification] OsPRR1 OE propagates via PRR1→CCA1 -1 → CCA1↓ → IPA1↓ via CCA1→IPA1 +1 → TB1↓ → tillers↑. Cascade amplification 8.18x makes predicted direction opposite to the expected decrease.
failures.fix_strategy: Introduce dampening on the CCA1→IPA1 path or re-examine PRR1→CCA1 weight (currently ratio=8.18 is excessive).

failures.explanation: [cascade_amplification] ostir1 osafb2 double KO: Auxin signalling loss reduces SL biosynthesis → net tiller increase predicted. Literature phenotype: reduced tillering. Framework misses direct auxin transport contribution.
failures.fix_strategy: TIR1 → D10/D17 (+1) inhibitor path disproportionately increases tillers when TIR1 KO. Add auxin-transport-mediated repression path (Auxin→PIN1B→Tiller_Number -1) to balance.

failures.explanation: DST GOF expected=increased but DST→CKX2 +1 predicts DST↑ → CKX2↑ → CK↓ → TB1↑ → tillers↓. Raw encoding inconsistent with T076 DST OE → decreased.

d53-D + GR24 (Trap 5): stabilised D53 (gm=2.0) + exogenous Strigolactone. Framework adds Strigolactone regardless of whether D53 can be degraded. SL cascade still flows D14→D53(-1) partially, producing false decreased prediction (ratio 0.67). Expected unchanged.

fc1 (=ostb1) + GR24 (Trap 5): TB1 KO blocks TB1→Tiller_Number -1 path. Without this edge, GR24 suppression has no phenotypic target. Model predicts increased; expected unchanged because fc1 phenotype dominates.

ngr5 + high N: Model adds Nitrogen exogenous regardless of NGR5 status. Nitrogen→LBD37→TCP19→DLT path still propagates, producing predicted increased (ratio 1.07). Expected unchanged because ngr5 blocks N-induced tillering.

ipa1-1D d53-D double (both stabilised GOF gm=2.0): ratio 0.976 (near-unity), geometric-mean dilution cancels both perturbations. Literature: ipa1-1D suppresses d53 high-tillering (decreased). Dominant upstream dominance lost in symmetric GOF model.
failures.fix_strategy: Consider strengthening D53→IPA1 -1 or adding redundant IPA1→TB1 +1 loop so double-mutant does not geometric-mean-dilute.

failures.explanation: FC1-OE in d3 background: ratio=1.0 (no propagation). D3 KO releases D53 and downstream TB1 should rise, but FC1 OE should dominate TB1 pathway. Current geometric-mean averaging makes the two perturbations cancel.
failures.fix_strategy: Add direct TB1→Tiller_Number path weighting so that FC1 OE dominates over d3 high-tillering.

failures.explanation: D53-RNAi in d3 background: ratio=1.0 flat prediction. Expected decreased (D53 knockdown rescues d3 high-tillering).
failures.fix_strategy: Review D53→IPA1, D53→MOC1, D53→CKX9 edge weights; currently D53 KD in d3 background gives flat prediction due to activator-floor effects.

failures.explanation: D53-RNAi in d14: ratio=1.0 flat. Rescue expected (decreased from d14 baseline).
failures.fix_strategy: Same fix as T098 — D53 KD should dominate in d14 background rescue.

failures.explanation: Sucrose treatment on d53-D: Sucrose→D53 +1 cannot push already-saturated D53 (gm=2.0). But Sucrose→CCA1 -1 still propagates → CCA1↓ → IPA1↓ → TB1↓ → tillers↑ (ratio 2.56). Expected unchanged because sucrose via D53 is the dominant path and D53 is already saturated. Framework cannot condition path-activation on D53 saturation state.

OsBZR1 KD expected=increased. Network: BZR1→TB1 -1 gives BZR1 KD → TB1↑ → tillers↓ (predicted decreased). Literature reports opposite — may reflect BR-independent role of BZR1. Possible sign issue at BZR1→TB1 edge.

[cascade_inversion] Brassinosteroid treatment: BR→BZR1 +1, BZR1→TB1 -1 → BR reduces TB1 → increased tillers predicted (ratio 2.38). Literature reports BR reduces tillers. Sign of BZR1→TB1 likely inverted in network.
failures.fix_strategy: Consider flipping BZR1→TB1 sign to +1 (BZR1 activates TB1 in rice shoot per Liu 2018). This would make BR → TB1↑ → tillers↓ consistent with literature.

failures.explanation: FC1-OE in d3 background (alt encoding): ratio=1.0, geometric-mean dilution.
failures.fix_strategy: Duplicate of T097 failure (same test re-encoded). Same fix applies.

failures.explanation: [cascade_inversion] OsYUC KO predicted increased (ratio 2.40); expected decreased. Cascade sign on Auxin→SL pathway dominates, missing direct auxin-biosynthesis role in meristem establishment.
failures.fix_strategy: YUCCA→Auxin→TIR1→D10/D17 path predicts yuc KO → less Auxin → less SL → more tillers. Literature: yuc KO decreases tillers (meristem initiation failure). Add YUCCA → MOC1 +1 path or weaken Auxin→SL link.

failures.explanation: [cascade_inversion] OsTAR2 KD predicted increased (ratio 1.14); expected decreased. Same mechanism as T133.
failures.fix_strategy: Same fix as T133 — TAR2 is redundant with YUCCA in auxin biosynthesis; same cascade issue.

failures.explanation: ipa1-1D d53 double (alt encoding of T095): flat prediction due to geometric-mean dilution of two GOF perturbations at gm=2.0.
failures.fix_strategy: Same as T095 — symmetric GOF dilution.

failures.explanation: Ub:IPI1 in ipa1-1D: ratio=1.0. IPI1 OE should degrade IPA1 protein but current network only has IPI1→IPA1 -1 as a transcriptional repressor; cannot reduce the stabilised-protein pool.
failures.fix_strategy: Add IPI1→IPA1 inhibitor edge weighting so that IPI1 OE dominates IPA1 GOF. Currently both perturb IPA1 with opposing signs, net flat.

failures.explanation: OsSHI1-OE + IPA1-OE: ratio=1.0 flat. Two opposing perturbations on IPA1 cancel exactly.
failures.fix_strategy: OsSHI1 OE + IPA1 OE: SHI1→IPA1 -1 cancels the IPA1 OE directly. Literature reports still-increased tillers (IPA1 pool only partially suppressed).

failures.explanation: CK treatment on d3 background: ratio 0.99 (unchanged predicted). Expected increased. d3 already maximises CK pathway so exogenous CK has little marginal effect in model.
failures.fix_strategy: CK + d3: d3 high-tillering + CK should be additive. Model ratio 0.988 near-unity from d3-saturation masking CK effect.

failures.explanation: IPA1-OE in d14 background: D14 KO upstream should release D53 → MOC1↑. IPA1 OE also pushes TB1↑. Both agree on TB1↑ direction, but ratio=1.0 suggests geometric-mean dilution in the combined simulation.
failures.fix_strategy: D14 KO + IPA1 OE: both perturb paths leading to TB1 with opposing effects. Current model: ratio=1.0.

failures.explanation: [cascade_amplification] ohk4 ipa1 double KO: ratio 31.6, cascade amplification from HK4 KO side dominates IPA1 KO contribution. Literature: ipa1-like (decreased).
failures.fix_strategy: Same as T039 — HK4 KO cascade overwhelms IPA1 KO.

failures.explanation: OsRR21-OE in ohk4: direct RR21 OE should bypass HK4 KO. Model treats them as two separate perturbations with diluted effect.
failures.fix_strategy: OsRR21 OE in ohk4: RR21 downstream of HK4 → partial rescue. Model: ratio=1.0 flat.

failures.explanation: Low-N + d53-D: ratio=1.0. D53 gm=2.0 already saturates downstream; Nitrogen gm=0.5 effect is masked.
failures.fix_strategy: Low-N on d53 background: same GOF-saturation issue as T095 — no further dynamic range when D53 is already maximal.

failures.explanation: Low-N + d3: d3 KO + Nitrogen gm=0.5. D3 KO already releases D53 in steady-state; low-N cannot further reduce the saturated pathway. Ratio 1.0. Literature: reduced tillers under low-N even in d3.
[cascade_inversion] ngr5 + GR24: Expected decreased (SL signalling intact). Model predicts increased. NGR5→D14 inhibition sign creates two opposing paths that do not resolve correctly.
failures.fix_strategy: ngr5 + GR24: NGR5 KO removes NGR5→TB1 -1 inhibition → TB1↑ → tillers↓. But NGR5 KO also removes NGR5→D14 -1 → D14↑ → D53↓ → tillers↑. Net ratio 1.38 (increased). Literature: SL signal intact → decreased tillers with GR24.

failures.explanation: [cascade_inversion] Shade expected decreased, predicted increased with strong amplification. Missing shade-avoidance path (phyB/PIF→TB1 +1) that dominates in rice.
failures.fix_strategy: Shade (Light gm=0.5): Light→CCA1 +1 predicts CCA1↓ → IPA1↓ → TB1↓ → tillers↑ (ratio 8.18). Literature: shade REDUCES tillers. Missing direct Light→Sucrose or Light→photosynthate → Sucrose edge, OR Light→TB1 via phyB-PIF route.

failures.explanation: Both perturbations on TB1 arm with opposing effects. BZR1→TB1 sign issue (T115) compounds the problem.
failures.fix_strategy: osbzr1 d53-D double: BZR1 KO + D53 GOF opposing effects. Ratio 0.168 predicts decreased; literature increased (d53 dominates).

failures.explanation: ngr5 + PBZ: NGR5 KO + GA20OX2 gm=0.1. Model ratio=1.0 (flat). Expected increased via SLR1 stabilisation (GA blockade) → MOC1↑ even without NGR5. Framework cannot resolve the GA-driven SLR1 stabilisation at this small KD value.

slr1-d SLR1-OE + GA: stabilised DELLA (gm=2.0) + GA exogenous=1.0. Model: GA→GID1→SLR1 -1 still reduces SLR1 even when gm=2.0. Ratio 0.037 (strong decrease) but literature says high tillers retained (slr1-d is GA-resistant). Framework limitation parallel to d53-D + GR24 (T083).

osvil2 ostb1 double: VIL2 KO + TB1 KO. Both push tillers↑, predicted ratio 10x increase. Literature: "similar to ostb1" — same direction qualitatively, possibly quantitatively different. Raw encoding "decreased" may reflect panicle-stage measurement vs. tiller-count at heading.
Duplicate encoding of T177 (different raw entry). Same failure mode.
NGR5-OE in dtn1 background: partial rescue expected (increased from dtn1-low-tiller baseline). Model: flat due to DTN1 KO upstream removing Sucrose supply that NGR5 depends on.
failures.fix_strategy: NGR5-OE in dtn1: NGR5 OE cannot fully compensate DTN1 KO via alternative Sucrose sources. Model: ratio=1.0 flat.

failures.explanation: oshk3 oshk4 double mapped to HK4 single KO; HK3 composite not represented. Same cascade inversion as T039.
failures.fix_strategy: OsHK3 absent from network → ohk3 ohk4 encoded as HK4 KO only. Same failure as T039.

failures.explanation: OsGATA8 KO + high N: GATA8 KO removes GATA8→TCP19 -1 → TCP19↑ → DLT↓ → tillers↓. Nitrogen also activates NGR5 and LBD37. Model: Nitrogen effect dominates → ratio 2.06 (increased). Literature: GATA8-L accessions show reduced productive tillers even under high N because productive-tiller distinction is not captured in total-tiller phenotype node.
